SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ApiGateway
The API Gateway is the single point of entry for all user-facing requests.
AutomationHub
Concrete implementation of IAutomationHub.
AutomationRule
Represents a user-defined automation rule.
AutomationRuleMessage
Payload for messages published to the TopicType.AUTOMATION topic.
AutomationRuleMessage.Operation
The type of automation rule operation carried by this message.
Command
Represents a command issued to an edge device.
CommandStatus
Represents the result status of a command sent to an edge device.
CommandTimeoutWatcher
Watches in-flight commands and marks them as failed if no ACK is received within the configured timeout window.
Coordinator
Concrete implementation of ICoordinator.
CoordinatorServerHandler
Netty inbound handler for the Coordinator node's TCP server.
CoordinatorServerRunner
Boots and runs the Netty TCP server on a Coordinator node.
Device
Represents a registered smart home edge device.
DeviceAction
Represents the set of actions that can be issued to edge devices via a Command.
DeviceEvent
Represents an event emitted by an input-type edge device (e.g., motion sensor, doorbell, light sensor).
DeviceType
Represents the type of a smart home edge device.
Doorbell
Represents a smart doorbell edge device.
ElectionMessage
Payload for messages published to the TopicType.ELECTION topic.
ElectionMessage.Type
The type of election protocol message.
EventListenerRunner
Drains the Automation Hub's inbound device event queue and evaluates rules in a dedicated thread, keeping rule evaluation off the Netty I/O threads.
HeartbeatMonitor
Monitors heartbeat liveness for both edge devices and peer coordinator nodes, and triggers the appropriate recovery action when a heartbeat is missed.
HeartbeatSender
Periodically emits heartbeat messages to the TopicType.HEARTBEAT topic on the Message Bus.
IAutomationHub
Interface for the Smart Home Automation Hub.
ICoordinator
Interface for the Smart Home Coordinator node.
IEdgeDevice
Interface shared by all Smart Home edge devices.
IMessageBus
Interface for the Smart Home Message Bus (Connection Manager).
InputDevice
Base class for input-type edge devices (motion sensors, light sensors, doorbells).
LeaderElectionRunner
Runs the Bully Algorithm leader election protocol in a dedicated thread.
LeaderPollerRunner
Polls the coordinator cluster to discover the current leader, running in a dedicated thread so the ApiGateway main thread is not blocked during startup or after a failover event.
LightSensor
Represents an ambient light sensor edge device.
Message<T>
A generic envelope for all messages transmitted over the Message Bus.
MessageBus
The Message Bus — a standalone process that routes messages between all Smart Home components over persistent Netty TCP connections.
MessageBusClientRunner
Establishes and maintains a Netty TCP client connection from any system component (coordinator node, edge device, automation hub) to the Message Bus server.
MessageBusMain
Entry point for the standalone Message Bus process.
MessageBusServerHandler
Netty inbound channel handler for the Message Bus server.
MessageBusServerRunner
Boots and runs the Netty TCP server for the Smart Home Message Bus.
MessageDispatcherRunner
The dispatcher thread for the Message Bus process.
MessageSerializer
Utility class for serializing and deserializing Message objects to and from JSON strings for transmission over Netty TCP channels.
MotionSensor
Represents a motion sensor edge device.
RegistrationPayload
The payload published by an edge device to the TopicType.REGISTER topic on startup.
SmartLight
Represents a smart light edge device.
SmartSpeaker
Represents a smart speaker edge device.
TopicType
Represents the available pub/sub topics on the Message Bus.
